examples: The net result is a continuous flow of gas, starting as hot gases in intergalactic space and ending as a drizzle of cool gas called a "cooling flow," falling into the central galaxy.
Intergalactic travel remains just a nice idea.
The physicist Fabian reasoned that as intergalactic gas cools, the cooler gas shrinks inward toward the center of the galaxy.
If they find one, maybe extraterrestrials could give us some tips on intergalactic solar technology.
There should be an intergalactic day of mourning and celebration, but there probably won't be.
